name: Hash Vault AI Storage Array
description: All-flash AI-native storage system tuned for petabyte-scale dataset streaming. GPUDirect Storage, RDMA over 400GbE, and zero-copy tiering keep your GPUs saturated — never starved.

specs.AI_UseCase: Training dataset hosting, vector DB, RAG pipelines

name: Hash Titan Heavy AI Cargo Platform
description: A 35 kg heavy-lift industrial VTOL platform rated for 50 kg payloads and 120 km range. AI mission orchestration, multi-modal sensor fusion, and hybrid-electric propulsion enable autonomous logistics at industrial scale.

specs.AI_UseCase: Industrial logistics, offshore resupply, disaster response

name: Hash Nebula H200 GPU Server
description: Data-center grade 8-GPU server built for frontier-scale training. Featuring NVIDIA H200 Tensor Core GPUs with 141GB HBM3e each, NVLink 5.0 fabric, and redundant 3000W titanium PSUs. The gold standard for training foundation models.

specs.CPU: Dual Intel Xeon Platinum 8592+ (128 cores total)
specs.AI_UseCase: Foundation model training, distributed pretraining, HPC
